BEER VOLTA.rule: - **Shop Rule (BEER VOLTA)**: The name is usually `Japanese Name / English Name`. In the English part, the first word(s) are typically the brewery followed by the beer name.
BEER VOLTA.examples:
1. "パリッシュ サイプレスシェード / Parish Cypress Shade" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Parish Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Cypress Shade"}
2. "ハドソンバレー イキガイ / Hudson Valley Ikigai" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Hudson Valley Brewery", "beer_name_en": "Ikigai"}

ちょうせいや.rule: - **Shop Rule (ちょうせいや)**: The name is formatted as `【Beer Name / Brewery Name】`. Since this is a specialized beer shop, assume it is a "beer" unless it's explicitly a glass or other merchandise.
ちょうせいや.examples:
1. "【Brown Saison/ヨロッコ】" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Yorocco Beer", "beer_name_en": "Brown Saison", "product_type": "beer"}
2. "【スタウト/箕面ビール】" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Minoh Beer", "beer_name_en": "Stout", "product_type": "beer"}

一期一会～る.rule: - **Shop Rule (一期一会～る)**: The name is usually `Brewery Name (JP/EN) Space Beer Name (JP/EN)`. No slash separator.
一期一会～る.examples:
1. "ニーディープ ディープヘイズ（KNEE DEEP Deep Haze）" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Knee Deep Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Deep Haze"}
2. "WCB ウェストコーストブルーイング ダークトレント" -> {"brewery_name_en": "West Coast Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Dark Torrent"}

アローム.rule: - **Shop Rule (アローム)**: The name is formatted as `Brewery / Beer [English Brewery / English Beer]`. The first part is always the brewery.
アローム.examples: 1. "トパトパ / ハックスター (Double IPA) [Topa Topa Brewing / Huckster]" -> {"brewery_name_en": "Topa Topa Brewing", "beer_name_en": "Huckster"}
